source: checkpoint: best_gen0380.pt (Risky-1 gen 285 + 95 gens d7 no-q +3/-1, pop 50)
note: Risky-2 — second-generation risky/entertainment-focused variant. Resumed from the previous shipped Risky (gen 285) with a synthetic pop-50 seed and trained 95 more gens at depth 7, quiescence OFF, max-sigma 1.0, asymmetric +3.0/0.0/-1.0 scoring. Run hit a peak best fitness of +24 at gen 378 (one individual: 8W/0L/4D — the strongest single-gen result across all training runs). Gen 380 (the closest checkpoint to that peak) ships here. Head-to-head vs the previous Risky (gen 285), 50 games d6 RO=8 seed=42: 13W/4L/33D — gen 380 beats Risky-1 by +9 tournament points while preserving the 34% decisive-game rate that defines the Risky play style. Final king weight K=1.59.
